access-control.description: Explicit access control defined for CRUD operations

user-owned.description: Collection with owner field and isOwner access control

published-content.description: Collection with publishedAt field and isPublished access control

rbac.description: Role-based access control with admin/user roles

Redirects to the Payload collection list for lesson duplications.

src/app/(payload)/admin/pdf-conversion/p.aiSummary: Dedicated admin page for PDF-to-exercise conversion

src/app/api/admin/recent-transactions/ro.aiSummary: Recent transactions list for admin dashboard widget

src/app/api/lessons/[id]/export/route.ts.aiSummary: Forwards GET to the Payload export endpoint with auth + payload context attached.

src/app/api/lessons/[id]/suggested-subje.aiSummary: Reads a lesson's exercises and guesses subject by block types.

src/app/api/webhooks/paypal/route.ts.aiSummary: Handles PayPal webhook events for payment confirmation and refunds

src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts.aiSummary: Handles Stripe webhook events for payment confirmation and refunds

src/brands/aguy/components/Logo.tsx.aiSummary: A-Guy brand logo component rendering the telescope SVG inline.

src/infra/auth/oauth_constants.ts.aiSummary: Cookie configuration and constants for OAuth authentication

src/infra/auth/oauth_cookies.ts.aiSummary: Cookie read/write/delete utilities for OAuth flow

src/infra/auth/oauth_crypto.ts.aiSummary: AES-256-GCM encryption for OAuth login secrets

src/infra/auth/oauth_logger.ts.aiSummary: PII-safe logging for OAuth events with email hashing

src/infra/auth/oauth_nonce.ts.aiSummary: Generate cryptographically secure random nonces for CSRF protection

src/infra/auth/oauth_sanitize.ts.aiSummary: Sanitize returnTo URLs to prevent open redirect vulnerabilities

src/infra/auth/oauth_session.ts.aiSummary: Issue Payload auth sessions using payload.login() for OAuth users

src/infra/auth/oauth_state.ts.aiSummary: Manage OAuth state nonces and returnTo URLs for CSRF protection

src/infra/auth/oauth_url.ts.aiSummary: Build canonical public base URLs for OAuth callbacks

src/infra/config/config-constants.ts.aiSummary: Configuration constants for the config manager

src/infra/config/runtime/config-values.t.aiSummary: Server-side runtime config values loader with DB→memory caching (tenant-scoped, domain-grouped)

src/infra/config/runtime/runtime-config..aiSummary: Server-side runtime config loader for secrets only (DB→memory caching, tenant-scoped)

src/infra/config/runtime/validate-chat-c.aiSummary: Validates chat configuration values at runtime to ensure required paths exist and values are within expected ranges

src/infra/config/system-params.ts.aiSummary: Type-safe accessors for system parameters stored in ConfigValues

src/infra/llm/pricing.ts.aiSummary: Centralized price table for LLM providers. Prices are in USD per 1,000,000 tokens.

src/infra/llm/smart-doc-loader.ts.aiSummary: Context-aware documentation loader that minimizes token usage

src/infra/media/embed/resolve.ts.aiSummary: Main entry point for resolving external URLs to embed metadata.

src/infra/media/embed/types.ts.aiSummary: Type definitions for external media embed providers

src/infra/media/embed/vimeo.ts.aiSummary: Vimeo URL detection, video ID extraction, and oEmbed metadata fetching

src/infra/media/embed/youtube.ts.aiSummary: YouTube URL detection, video ID extraction, and oEmbed metadata fetching

src/infra/media/youtube.ts.aiSummary: Client-side YouTube URL detection and embed URL generation (no API calls)

src/infra/qa/design-system/loader.ts.aiSummary: Loads and parses design system components from src/ui/shared/components

src/infra/qa/fixtures/loader.ts.aiSummary: Loads test fixtures from JSON files

src/infra/qa/index.ts.aiSummary: Main entry point for scenario-first development system scripts

src/infra/qa/prd-generator.ts.aiSummary: Generates Product Requirements Documents from scenarios with DS translations

src/infra/qa/prototype/loader.ts.aiSummary: Loads HTML prototype files and extracts element information without external dependencies

src/infra/qa/prototype/selector-extracto.aiSummary: Extracts and matches CSS selectors from prototype elements

src/infra/qa/scenario-converter.ts.aiSummary: Converts scenarios between editor format and QA runner format

src/infra/qa/schema.ts.aiSummary: Core Zod schemas for scenario-first development system

src/infra/qa/site-behavior/loader.ts.aiSummary: Loads site behavior specifications from JSON files

src/infra/qa/site-behavior/schema.ts.aiSummary: Zod schemas for site behavior specifications

src/infra/types/index.ts.aiSummary: Centralized type exports for easy discovery by AI agents

src/infra/utils/concurrency.ts.aiSummary: Bounded-parallelism queue: prevents thundering-herd on shared resources by limiting concurrent async operations; slots are claimed lazily, not upfront.

src/infra/utils/deepMerge.ts.aiSummary: Shallow copy of target + recursive merge of source; does not clone nested objects, so source object references are retained in the output.

src/infra/utils/formatDateTime.ts.aiSummary: Formats timestamps as MM/DD/YYYY in local time without timezone conversion; silently falls back to current time for invalid input.

src/infra/utils/generateMeta.ts.aiSummary: Generates Next.js Metadata from Payload page docs; title defaults to the generic "Payload Website Template" when no doc is provided.

src/infra/utils/generatePreviewPath.ts.aiSummary: Generates next/preview URLs for Payload draft previews; silently uses an empty PREVIEW_SECRET if the env var is unset, making preview links publicly guessable in that case.

src/infra/utils/getDocument.ts.aiSummary: Wraps Payload local API with unstable_cache; the cache tag scopes invalidation per collection+slug but the underlying query bypasses access control (overrideAccess defaults to true in local API).

src/infra/utils/getGlobals.ts.aiSummary: Wraps Payload findGlobal with unstable_cache; cache tag is global_<slug> so any update to the global invalidates it, but the query runs without access-control restrictions.

src/infra/utils/getMeUser.ts.aiSummary: Resolves the current user from JWT cookie by calling /api/users/me; redirects on auth failure only when a redirect target is supplied, otherwise returns null user silently.

src/infra/utils/getMediaUrl.ts.aiSummary: Converts relative media URLs to absolute; prepends client-side origin even when the URL is a full path under the same domain, so mismatches between server and client origins produce wrong URLs.

src/infra/utils/getRedirects.ts.aiSummary: Fetches all redirect rules from Payload and caches them as a single lump-sum tag; adding or removing a redirect invalidates the entire cache, not just the changed entry.

src/infra/utils/getURL.ts.aiSummary: Resolves server URL from env with Vercel/specific fallback order; getClientSideURL reads window.location which is only available in the browser.

src/infra/utils/graphics/viewport-utils..aiSummary: Viewport utility functions for auto-calculating, validating, and resolving graph display ranges

src/infra/utils/http.ts.aiSummary: Fetches a buffer with retry and exponential backoff; retries 5xx only, never retries 4xx client errors, and always throws after MAX_RETRIES rather than returning a partial result.

src/infra/utils/latex.ts.aiSummary: Injects LaTeX template strings into the editor at cursor position; does not validate whether the template is well-formed LaTeX before insertion.

src/infra/utils/latexToSpeech.ts.aiSummary: Bilingual LaTeX-to-speech converter for English and Hebrew

src/infra/utils/logger/index.ts.aiSummary: Re-exports all logger symbols from logger.ts; the barrel exists so callers import from @/infra/utils/logger rather than reaching into the subpath.

src/infra/utils/logger/logger.ts.aiSummary: Structured logger with pino; pretty-prints in development and JSON-outputs in production; transport is disabled to avoid worker.js thread-stream issues in dev.

src/infra/utils/mergeOpenGraph.ts.aiSummary: Merges caller OG overrides onto brand defaults fetched fresh per call; if brand resolution fails, silently falls back to a bare site-name entry with no image.

src/infra/utils/normalize-latex.ts.aiSummary: Converts AI-output LaTeX to remark-math-compatible delimiters; the Hebrew-escape step silently converts entire $ pairs to escaped text rather than failing, which can hide real delimiter-mismatch bugs upstream.

src/infra/utils/path-utils.ts.aiSummary: Normalizes URL paths for consistent matching; does not collapse // or resolve ../, so paths like //evil.com or /a/../b are passed through unchanged.

src/infra/utils/speech-recognition.d.ts.aiSummary: Type declarations for the Web Speech Recognition API

src/infra/utils/speechHelpers.ts.aiSummary: Shared helpers for speech synthesis: markdown stripping and language detection

src/infra/utils/test/mongodb-container.t.aiSummary: Starts a MongoDB testcontainer for each test suite; when USE_MONGO_SERVICE=true (CI) it returns the service container URL directly, bypassing testcontainers entirely for speed.

src/infra/utils/test/test-db-constraint..aiSummary: Throws at test startup if DATABASE_URL points to a production database; vector search tests are exempted via ALLOW_ATLAS_FOR_VECTOR_SEARCH but the exemption is easy to misuse for non-vector tests.

src/infra/utils/textPreprocessing.ts.aiSummary: Converts single newlines to Markdown hard breaks (trailing spaces); preserves existing hard breaks and paragraph breaks untouched.

src/infra/utils/toKebabCase.ts.aiSummary: Converts camelCase and space-separated strings to kebab-case; returns undefined when called on null/undefined without guarding.

src/infra/utils/ui.ts.aiSummary: Merges Tailwind class names using clsx+tailwind-merge; undefined or null inputs to cn() are silently dropped rather than causing errors.

src/infra/utils/useClickableCard.ts.aiSummary: Makes a card surface clickable by treating a non-link mousedown within the card as navigation; keyboard-only users and screen-reader users cannot activate the card behavior since there is no focusable element or aria role.

src/infra/utils/validation/common-schema.aiSummary: Shared Zod schemas for common fields; schemas like emailSchema and passwordSchema are intentionally permissive to avoid false rejections, so validation strictness must be enforced at the call site.

src/infra/utils/validation/index.ts.aiSummary: Re-exports validate, safeValidate, formatZodErrors, createValidationErrorResponse, and all common-schemas; callers import from this barrel rather than individual subpaths.

src/infra/utils/validation/validate.ts.aiSummary: Thin wrappers around Zod parse/safeParse; validate() throws on failure while safeValidate() returns a discriminated union — callers must choose deliberately rather than always reaching for the throwing variant.

src/infra/utils/with-timeout.ts.aiSummary: Races a promise against a timer; throws a TimeoutError when the timer wins.

src/infra/utils/zodToPayloadError.ts.aiSummary: Converts Zod validation errors to Payload ValidationError so they surface in the admin UI; the fieldPrefix parameter must match the actual JSON path prefix used in Payload's data storage or errors are silently misaddressed.

src/lib/payment/env.ts.aiSummary: Validates and exposes payment provider environment variables.

src/lib/payment/grant-entitlements.ts.aiSummary: Grants course and feature entitlements after successful payment using atomic MongoDB operations

src/server/api/responses.ts.aiSummary: Provides apiSuccess/apiError/ApiErrors factory and Zod-based request body/query parsers — every API route should use these to keep error shapes consistent.

src/server/api/with-api-handler.ts.aiSummary: Wrap every Next.js API route with this instead of writing auth/parsing/error-handling inline — it owns the try/catch and treats operational errors (ValidationError, "not found", "already exists") as 400s and all others as 500s.

src/server/config/guest-chat-config.ts.aiSummary: Typed getter for guest_chat domain config values with hardcoded fallbacks

src/server/email/services/purchase-recei.aiSummary: Sends purchase receipt emails after successful payment webhooks

src/server/email/templates/purchase-rece.aiSummary: English purchase receipt email sent to users after successful payment
Hebrew purchase receipt email sent to users after successful payment

src/server/payload/access/configAdminOnl.aiSummary: Access control that restricts config operations to admins only

src/server/payload/collections/AccessCod.aiSummary: Stores coupon/access codes that grant entitlements to courses

src/server/payload/collections/AgentBeha.aiSummary: Collection for managing agent behavior prompts that define AI learning agent personality and communication style.

src/server/payload/collections/ConfigAud.aiSummary: Append-only audit log for config secret mutations

src/server/payload/collections/ConfigSec.aiSummary: Tenant-scoped encrypted secrets. All values are always encrypted.

src/server/payload/collections/ConfigVal.aiSummary: Domain-based configuration values stored as JSON, tenant-scoped

src/server/payload/collections/ContextEx.aiSummary: Hidden storage for PDF-to-LaTeX extraction output, decoupled from lessonContextText

src/server/payload/collections/Conversat.aiSummary: Context-scoped conversations with polymorphic context references

src/server/payload/collections/Coupons.t.aiSummary: Stores discount coupon codes for checkout (percentage or fixed amount)

src/server/payload/collections/Courses.t.aiSummary: Courses collection with chapters relationship and published state

src/server/payload/collections/Enrollmen.aiSummary: Course enrollment records with status, source tracking, and history

src/server/payload/collections/FormulaSh.aiSummary: Reusable formula sheet collection for math reference content

src/server/payload/collections/GuestSess.aiSummary: Expiring guest sessions for anonymous chat persistence

src/server/payload/collections/Interacti.aiSummary: Caches the structured primitive payload Gemini returns for a given

src/server/payload/collections/LessonDup.aiSummary: Tracks lesson duplication requests with variation level and async processing state.

src/server/payload/collections/Media/hoo.aiSummary: beforeChange hook that resolves external URLs to embed metadata.

src/server/payload/collections/MemoryIte.aiSummary: Memory items with context hierarchy for semantic retrieval

src/server/payload/collections/PaymentSt.aiSummary: Daily payment aggregations for admin analytics

src/server/payload/collections/TeacherPr.aiSummary: Collection for managing teacher profiles that define AI chat behavior.

src/server/payload/collections/Transacti.aiSummary: Records payment transactions initiated via checkout API

src/server/payload/collections/UserProgr.aiSummary: User progress tracking for chapters, lessons, and exercises

src/server/payload/collections/UserSetti.aiSummary: Collection for storing per-user settings including teacher profile selection

src/server/payload/collections/UserStats.aiSummary: User statistics tracking for time spent, daily streak, and activity history

src/server/payload/collections/Users/ind.aiSummary: Users collection with authentication, RBAC roles, and audit hooks

src/server/payload/collections/WebhookEv.aiSummary: Central event log for webhook deduplication across payment providers

src/server/payload/endpoints/agent/auth-.aiSummary: Shared resolver for authenticated users and guest sessions

src/server/payload/endpoints/agent/chat..aiSummary: Chat endpoint with context scoping, memory retrieval, MCP tools for admins, guest sessions, and automatic maintenance

src/server/payload/endpoints/agent/get-c.aiSummary: Get conversation endpoint with explicit user/guest isolation

src/server/payload/endpoints/agent/reset.aiSummary: Reset endpoint for context-scoped conversations with guest support

src/server/payload/endpoints/cron/guest-.aiSummary: Deletes expired guest sessions and their associated orphaned conversations

src/server/payload/endpoints/cron/media-.aiSummary: Deletes expired ephemeral media files and database records

src/server/payload/endpoints/lessons/dup.aiSummary: Creates a LessonDuplications record. For level=none, deep-clones the lesson + exercises inline.

src/server/payload/endpoints/lessons/exp.aiSummary: Exports a lesson and its ordered exercises as canonical JSON for admin review or sharing.

src/server/payload/endpoints/seed/guest-.aiSummary: Seeds guest_chat domain defaults into config_values collection

src/server/payload/endpoints/seed/intro-.aiSummary: Seed data for the active brand's introduction page, converted from docs/a-guy/intro.md

src/server/payload/endpoints/seed/system.aiSummary: Seeds default system parameters into ConfigValues (global domain)

src/server/payload/hooks/configSecrets/a.aiSummary: Creates audit log entries after config secret mutations
Clears all values in Admin UI responses (secrets-only collection), but skips for internal runtime load

src/server/payload/hooks/configSecrets/b.aiSummary: Encrypts secrets and validates config entries before save

src/server/payload/hooks/configValues/be.aiSummary: Validates config values and detects secret-like keys before save

src/server/payload/hooks/coupons/compute.aiSummary: Computes derived coupon list-display fields for admin UI

src/server/payload/hooks/lessons/syncLes.aiSummary: Syncs lesson blocks array when exercises/content pages change

src/server/payload/migrations/localize-t.aiSummary: One-time migration to convert dual-field teacher profiles to per-locale documents

src/server/payload/migrations/populateLe.aiSummary: One-time migration to populate lesson blocks from existing exercises and content pages

src/server/repos/queries/formula-sheets..aiSummary: Server-side queries for formula sheet resolution with locale fallback

src/server/services/chat-quota.ts.aiSummary: Checks and increments authenticated user chat quota (rolling window)

src/server/services/conversation-service.aiSummary: Service for managing conversations with context scoping and access control

src/server/services/diff.ts.aiSummary: Classifies the type of difference between two exercise block arrays.

src/server/services/guest-session-upgrad.aiSummary: Atomic transfer of guest conversations to user account

src/server/services/guest-session.ts.aiSummary: Guest session lifecycle: create, validate, extend, revoke

src/server/services/lesson-duplication/d.aiSummary: Classifies the type of difference between two exercise block arrays.

src/server/services/lesson-duplication/g.aiSummary: Renders GeometrySpecV1 and AxisSpecV1 to SVG markup strings for lesson export.

src/server/services/lesson-duplication/s.aiSummary: Pure-function detector that returns true only for exercises that can safely be varied by numeric substitution without AI.
Routes exercises to the appropriate variation strategy (script or AI).
Deterministic numeric substitution strategy for purely-algebraic exercises at light level.
Defines the VariationStrategy interface and VariationResult type used by the duplication router.
Scans the blocks of every exercise in a lesson to guess the lesson's subject (algebra/geometry/calculus/mixed).

src/server/services/lesson-export/to-can.aiSummary: Converts exercise content blocks to canonical export format.

Renders a single source-vs-output exercise pair with diff classification.
Shows source vs variation side-by-side with diff classification for all exercises.

src/ui/admin/LessonDuplicationReview/lib.aiSummary: Classifies the type of difference between two exercise block arrays.

src/ui/admin/LessonExportButton/LessonEx.aiSummary: Exports a lesson and its exercises as a JSON file for backup or offline review.

src/ui/admin/PdfConversion/PdfSelector/i.aiSummary: Dropdown to select a PDF file from a lesson's content files

src/ui/admin/PdfConversion/SidebarLink/i.aiSummary: Navigation link for PDF conversion in the admin sidebar

src/ui/admin/QuillField/index.tsx.aiSummary: Raw HTML editor for HtmlBlock — admin-only content creation.

src/ui/admin/RecentTransactionsWidget/in.aiSummary: Recent transactions list for the admin dashboard

src/ui/admin/RevenueWidget/index.tsx.aiSummary: Revenue metric cards for the admin dashboard

src/ui/admin/TopProductsWidget/index.tsx.aiSummary: Top products ranked by revenue for the admin dashboard

src/ui/admin/TransactionEditView/index.t.aiSummary: Full payment timeline view replacing Payload's default table layout

src/ui/admin/TransactionStatusCell/index.aiSummary: Shows Hebrew label with color badge for transaction status

src/ui/admin/UserEmail/index.tsx.aiSummary: Displays the current logged-in user's email in the admin sidebar

src/ui/admin/VersionInfo/index.tsx.aiSummary: App version display for admin footer

src/ui/admin/context-exercise-viewer/ind.aiSummary: Displays and allows editing of parsed exercises from ContextExtractions collection

src/ui/shared/components/tabs.tsx.aiSummary: Generic tabs component with trigger and content panels

Client-side renderer for formula sheet content (PDF or HTML blocks)

Renders raw LaTeX source as a typeset academic document with live TikZ diagrams.
Converts raw LaTeX source to markdown+math for rendering via MathMarkdown.

src/ui/shared/primitives/MathMarkdown/in.aiSummary: Shared markdown renderer with KaTeX math support and RTL isolation

src/ui/shared/primitives/MathMarkdown/re.aiSummary: Rehype plugin that wraps KaTeX math output with dir="ltr" for RTL language support
Simplified remark plugin to transform ::text-highlight-N{text} syntax (single-node only)
